creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks! 

Next time, please use an editor and a mailer that does not replace tabs 
with spaces.  Also, make sure you specify the exact port name - there is 
no such thing as /usr/ports/firebird, and there are several ports named 
'firebird' in the tree :)
